portfolio.label: Featured Work
portfolio.title: Software Implementation & Customization
portfolio.description: Here are some of the projects we have worked on to implement and customize software solutions according to our clients' needs across various sectors.

smartTeacher.title: App Sheet Smart Teacher
smartTeacher.detail: AppSheet Smart Teacher is an AppSheet-based teacher activity management application designed to help schools record, monitor, and evaluate teacher activities during working hours in a structured, digital, and real-time manner. This application is a practical solution to replace manual recording, making administrative processes more efficient, accurate, and transparent.

smartTalent.title: Smart Talent
smartTalent.detail: Smart Talent is a school HR management system that allows management to monitor attendance, lateness, work journals, and staff mutabaah in real-time through an integrated dashboard. Educators and staff can also view their personal performance achievements as evaluation material to improve work performance.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: IT KCM
about.subtitle: PT Kibar Cendekia Muda
about.description: Kibar Cendekia Muda is an information technology development company focusing on solutions for education, particularly in the implementation of Smart School and Smart Class. We provide various products and services designed to meet modern school administration needs and enhance student learning experiences.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Bringing technological innovation to improve the quality of education in Indonesia through integrated Smart School and Smart Class solutions. Providing platforms that can automate school management and increase teaching-learning efficiency with the latest technology.

dataBased.title: Data Based
dataBased.description: Latest Technology: Using the latest technologies like artificial intelligence and data analysis to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the educational process. Easy Integration: Platforms that are easy to implement and integrate with existing school technology infrastructure.

transformation.label: Digital Transformation
transformation.title: Supporting Digital Educational Transformation
transformation.description: Supporting digital transformation in the educational environment through systems that are integrated, efficient, and easy to use. These solutions are designed to help educational institutions manage learning and administrative activities in a more organized, modern, and sustainable way.
